context7.description: Live documentation lookup for MapLibre, georaster, Open-Meteo, IMD, and the other libraries the portal depends on. Use this in place of WebFetch for library docs — the docs change frequently and context7 stays current.

playwright.description: Browser automation for testing the cell panel, flood animation, and inundation overlay. Project already has playwright as a dep (record-video.mjs uses it) so the binary is on hand.
